plan.failureSummary: The test failed during a cached (DETERMINISTIC) run while attempting to click a button with the text '×'. This element was likely a banner or modal close button that existed when the cache was generated but is no longer present or has a different structure on the current page.
observedIndicators: selectorFailedDuringPageAi === true (implied by click failure in ai block)
The failed selector '//button[normalize-space(.)=\'×\']' is not part of the explicit objective but likely a prerequisite action in the cache.

remediationSteps.details: Clear the AI cache and re-run the test. This will force the autonomous agent to find a new path to the 'Resources' menu without relying on the stale '×' button selector.

remediationSteps.summary: Review UI changes if cache clearing fails.
remediationSteps.details: If the failure persists after clearing the cache, check if the 'Resources' menu or 'Developer docs' link has undergone a significant structural change that requires a more descriptive prompt.

plan.notes: The '×' button selector is typical of a one-time popup or promotional banner (like the 'Rocky AI' banner seen in the screenshot) that might have changed or been dismissed differently. Since the test is running in deterministic mode, it's trying to follow a rigid path that is now stale. Clearing the cache will allow the AI to re-evaluate the page and find the 'Resources' menu directly.
